package.name: hyumm_description
package.description: ROS1 (catkin) robot description for the HYU-MM mobile manipulator (hyumm_scan: mobile base + Indy7 + scanner). Meshes/URDF copied from the ROS2/ament hyumm_scan_description so they are resolvable on the ROS1 rospack path (package://hyumm_description/...). Used for the RViz robot model.
